mapper.insert: INSERT INTO portfolio_positions (account_id, stock_code, stock_name, market, quantity, cost_price, current_price, profit_loss, profit_loss_pct, market_value, position_pct, buy_date, stop_loss_price, target_price, tags, note, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{accountId}, #{stockCode}, #{stockName}, #{market}, #{quantity}, #{costPrice}, #{currentPrice}, #{profitLoss}, #{profitLossPct}, #{marketValue}, #{positionPct}, #{buyDate}, #{stopLossPrice}, #{targetPrice}, #{tags}, #{note}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE portfolio_positions SET account_id=#{accountId}, stock_code=#{stockCode}, stock_name=#{stockName}, market=#{market}, quantity=#{quantity}, cost_price=#{costPrice}, current_price=#{currentPrice}, profit_loss=#{profitLoss}, profit_loss_pct=#{profitLossPct}, market_value=#{marketValue}, position_pct=#{positionPct}, buy_date=#{buyDate}, stop_loss_price=#{stopLossPrice}, target_price=#{targetPrice}, tags=#{tags}, note=#{note}, updated_at=#{updatedAt} WHERE id=#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM portfolio_positions ORDER BY updated_at DESC
SELECT * FROM portfolio_positions WHERE stock_code = #{stockCode} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM portfolio_positions WHERE account_id = #{accountId} ORDER BY updated_at DESC
SELECT * FROM portfolio_positions WHERE account_id = #{accountId} AND stock_code = #{stockCode} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM portfolio_positions WHERE market = #{market} ORDER BY market_value DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM portfolio_positions WHERE profit_loss_pct > #{pct}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM portfolio_positions WHERE profit_loss_pct < #{pct}
